description_long: This is a ceramic coffee mug with a cylindrical shape and a smooth, glossy surface. The mug is primarily off-white in color and features a large, sturdy handle attached to one side. On the front, there is a bold black text that reads 'I ♥ MONDAYS', with the heart symbol rendered in bright red. The interior of the mug is the same off-white color as the exterior, and the rim is slightly rounded for comfortable drinking. The mug's design is simple yet expressive, making it suitable for both home and office environments.
description: A glossy off-white ceramic mug with a large handle and 'I ♥ MONDAYS' text in black and red on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'I ♥ MONDAYS' text and red heart clearly, with the handle visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered, partially obscuring the text and heart graphic.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain off-white surface and the handle on the left, with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the start of the text 'I' and part of 'MONDAYS', with the handle not visible.
